upward_trend_label: Which cluster has the strongest upward trend?
Find the labeled cluster whose points show the strongest upward trend.
Based on the point-cloud direction, which cluster is most clearly upward?
Compare the cluster trends. Which cluster has the strongest upward pattern?

downward_trend_label: Which cluster has the strongest downward trend?

largest_horizontal_spread_label: Which cluster has the largest horizontal spread?
Find the labeled cluster with the largest horizontal dispersion.
Compare the point-cloud shapes. Which cluster has the largest horizontal spread?
What cluster label has the largest spread in the horizontal direction?
Which cluster has points with the largest horizontal spread?
smallest_horizontal_spread_label: Which cluster has the smallest horizontal spread?
Find the labeled cluster with the smallest horizontal dispersion.
Compare the point-cloud shapes. Which cluster has the smallest horizontal spread?
What cluster label has the smallest spread in the horizontal direction?

largest_vertical_spread_label: Which cluster has the largest vertical spread?

smallest_vertical_spread_label: Which cluster has the smallest vertical spread?

largest_overall_spread_label: Which cluster has the largest overall spread?
Find the labeled cluster with the largest overall dispersion.

What cluster label has the largest combined spread across both axes?
Which cluster has points with the largest overall spread?
smallest_overall_spread_label: Which cluster has the smallest overall spread?
Find the labeled cluster with the smallest overall dispersion.
Compare the point-cloud shapes. Which cluster has the smallest overall spread?

largest_cluster_area_label: Using the shaded cluster footprints, which cluster has the {area_rank_phrase} displayed area?
Compare the shaded footprints. What cluster label has the {area_rank_phrase} footprint area?
Which labeled cluster has the {area_rank_phrase} shaded footprint by area?
Using the displayed shaded cluster areas, which cluster is {area_rank_phrase}?
Which cluster's shaded footprint has the {area_rank_phrase} area?
smallest_cluster_area_label: Using the shaded cluster footprints, which cluster has the {area_rank_phrase} displayed area?

Which labeled cluster has the {area_rank_phrase} shaded footprint by area?
Using the displayed shaded cluster areas, which cluster is {area_rank_phrase}?

centroid_option_selection_label: For cluster "{target_cluster_label}", which option marker is closest to the cluster's mean center?
Estimate the mean center of cluster "{target_cluster_label}". Which option marker is closest to it?
Using the points in cluster "{target_cluster_label}", choose the option marker nearest to that cluster's centroid.
Which option marker best matches the center of mass of cluster "{target_cluster_label}"?
Find the centroid of cluster "{target_cluster_label}" by eye. Which option marker is closest?

query:upward_trend_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested cluster label as a string
query:upward_trend_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel box around the answer cluster hull

query:downward_trend_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested cluster label as a string
query:downward_trend_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel box around the answer cluster hull

query:largest_horizontal_spread_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested cluster label as a string
query:largest_horizontal_spread_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel box around the answer cluster hull

query:smallest_horizontal_spread_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested cluster label as a string
query:smallest_horizontal_spread_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel box around the answer cluster hull

query:largest_vertical_spread_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested cluster label as a string
query:largest_vertical_spread_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel box around the answer cluster hull

query:smallest_vertical_spread_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested cluster label as a string
query:smallest_vertical_spread_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel box around the answer cluster hull

query:largest_overall_spread_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel box around the answer cluster hull

query:smallest_overall_spread_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel box around the answer cluster hull

query:largest_cluster_area_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested cluster label as a string
query:largest_cluster_area_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel box around the answer cluster's shaded footprint

query:smallest_cluster_area_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested cluster label as a string
query:smallest_cluster_area_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel box around the answer cluster's shaded footprint

query:centroid_option_selection_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the selected option letter as a capital letter
query:centroid_option_selection_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x,y] pixel point at the center of the selected option marker
